name: おけけぬき
short_description: Okeke is shin hair to pull out. This game is to pull out about 6000 shin hairs on your shin. As you progress through the game, you can acquire new abilities and remove shin hairs more efficiently. Face the shin hairs, face yourself, and cleanse your shins to purify yourself.
detailed_description:
Okeke is shin hair to pull out. This game is to pull out about 6000 shin hairs on your shin. As you progress in the game, you can acquire new skills and remove shin hairs more efficiently. Face the shin hairs, face yourself, and cleanse your shin to purify yourself.

This game fully permits monetization through video and live-streaming.
Please do not overdo it when you play.

About Abilities
　There are a total of [/b] 9 types of abilities.
　Abilities can be enhanced by spending acquisition points.
　Each ability can be enhanced up to Lv5.

About Operation
　Mouse
　Move mouse to move tweezers.
　[Left click[/u] to grab the hairs.
　Grab the hair and move the mouse to pull out the hair.
　Right click and hold mouse button to rotate the leg.

　Keyboard.
　Use A,D keys to move the camera left and right.
　Use Ctrl,Space to move the camera up/down.
　Press W,S to Zoom in/Zoom out.
　Press Tab to open the Skill Selection screen.
　Press Esc to switch to the Suspend Menu.
